prompt: Edit image 1: Apply the modern header design from image 2. Replace the top section's plain background with the refreshing green-to-white gradient and update the date/amount display style.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 by transforming its header section. Adopt the modern header design from image 2, specifically incorporating its green-to-white horizontal gradient background. Update the date and amount display within this header: position the date (e.g., 'Mar 1, 2013') on the left, below 'Receipt', and move the total amount (e.g., '$9.00') to the top-right corner, applying the bold, large font style seen in image 2's header amount.
objects: Total amount "$9.00" in top-right corner, bold and large font
